NGX: Domestic & Foreign Portfolio Investments rise 3.35% to N1.803 trillion in April 2026
results.description: Total transactions on the Nigerian Exchange Limited (NGX) rose by 3.35% month-on-month to N1.803 trillion in April 2026, up from N1.744 trillion recorded in March 2026. The post NGX: Domestic & Foreign Portfolio Investments rise 3.35% to N1.803 trillion in April 2026 appeared first on Nairametrics .

results.title: 294-Unit Emblem Complex Could Rewrite Snohomish’s Bickford Avenue
results.description: Quarterra’s Emblem proposal would build 294 apartments, townhomes and about 10,000 sq ft of retail on 17.3 acres in Snohomish; the plan is under city review.
